  simp_rw [LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map]
  set sigma := (Module.support A M ∪ Module.support A (Submodule.torsion A M × M ⧸ Submodule.torsion A M)) ∩

    ext ⟨x, hx⟩
    simp [LocalizedModule.map_apply]
  have h2 : LocalizedModule.map S (Submodule.mkQ (Submodule.torsion A M)) = LinearMap.id := by
    ext x
    simp [LocalizedModule.map_apply]
  rw [h1, h2]
  apply LinearMap.bijective_prod
  all_goals infer_instance

      obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := hxs
      use y
      simp [hy]
    rw [this, this]
    apply LinearMap.ker_eq_bot_of_injective
    intro x hx
    simp only [Prod.mk.injEq, Prod.fst_comp, Prod.snd_comp,
      Subtype.val_comp, Submodule.mkQ_comp] at hx
    obtain ⟨hx1, hx2⟩ := hx
    rw [Submodule.mem_torsion] at hx1
    obtain ⟨a, ha, ha'⟩ := hx1
    have : a • x = 0 := by
      apply_fun (· : M → M)
      simp [ha']
    have : a ≠ 0 := by

      rw [ha0] at ha
      exact zero_ne_one ha
    have : x = 0 := by
      apply_fun (· : M → M)
      simp [this]
    exact this
  · intro p hp
    haveI : IsDomain (Localization p.1.primeCompl) :=

    have : (Submodule.torsion A M).localizedModule p.1.primeCompl = ⊥ := by

      intro hx
      obtain ⟨s, hs, hxs⟩ := hx
      rw [Submodule.mem_torsion] at hxs
      obtain ⟨a, ha, ha'⟩ := hxs
      use a, ha
      simp [ha']
    have : (M ⧸ Submodule.torsion A M).localizedModule p.1.primeCompl = ⊤ := by

      intro x hx
      obtain ⟨s, hs, hxs⟩ := hx

      obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := hxs
      use y
      simp [hy]
    rw [this, this]
    apply LinearMap.range_eq_top_of_surjective
    intro x
    use (0, x)

    · exact LocalizedModule.map_injective p.1.primeCompl Subtype.val Subtype.val_injective

    obtain ⟨r, hr⟩ := Module.mem_torsion_or_exists_non_zero_divisor_of_mem_support
      (Submodule.torsion A M) x.1 hp
    · use r
      simp [hr]
    · exfalso
      apply hr
      exact hp
  · intro p hp
    rw [LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff]
    intro x
    have h := Module.mem_torsion_or_exists_non_zero_divisor_of_mem_support
      (Submodule.torsion A M) x hp
    cases' h with r hr
    · exfalso
      apply hr
      exact hp
    · use r
      simp [hr]

refine ⟨⟨Submodule.torsionEmbedding A M, Submodule.quotientMk (Submodule.torsion A M)⟩, ?_⟩
  intro p hp
  haveI : IsDomain (Localization p.1.primeCompl) :=
    HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization {p} (by simp [hp]) (by simp) (by simp) |>.1
  have h := LocalizedModule.map_exact p.1.primeCompl
    (Submodule.torsionEmbedding A M) (Submodule.quotientMk (Submodule.torsion A M))
    (Submodule.exact_torsion A M)
  rw [LinearMap.exact_iff] at h
  have h₁ : Function.Injective (LocalizedModule.map p.1.primeCompl (Submodule.torsionEmbedding A M)) := by
    rw [← LinearMap.ker_eq_bot]
    rw [← Submodule.subsingleton_iff_eq_bot]
    rw [subsingleton_ker_convert]
    rw [LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff]
    intro x hx
    obtain ⟨s, hs, hsmul⟩ := hx
    rw [Submodule.mem_torsion] at hx
    obtain ⟨t, ht, htsmul⟩ := hx
    use s * t
    simp [hs, ht, hsmul, htsmul]
  have h₂ : Function.Surjective (LocalizedModule.map p.1.primeCompl (Submodule.quotientMk (Submodule.torsion A M))) := by
    apply LocalizedModule.map_surjective
    exact Submodule.mkQ_surjective (Submodule.torsion A M)
  exact ⟨h₁, h₂⟩

refine ⟨Subtype.val, Submodule.mkQ (Submodule.torsion A M), ?_⟩
  · exact Submodule.exact_subtype_val_mkQ (Submodule.torsion A M)
  · intro p hp
    have h1 : Module.IsTorsion A (Submodule.torsion A M) := Submodule.torsion_isTorsion
    have h2 : Module.IsTorsionFree A (M ⧸ Submodule.torsion A M) := Submodule.quotient_torsionFree
    rw [LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff]
    intro x
    obtain ⟨r, hr, hx⟩ := Submodule.mem_torsion_iff.mp (Submodule.torsion_le_torsion _ x)
    use r, by
      simp only [SetLike.mem_coe, Ideal.primeCompl, Set.mem_compl_iff, ne_eq, not_false_eq_true]
      contrapose! hr
      have : r ∈ nonZeroDivisors A := by
        rw [mem_nonZeroDivisors_iff_ne_zero]
        intro h
        apply hr
        simp [h]
      have : (r : Localization p.1.primeCompl) ≠ 0 := IsLocalization.map_ne_zero_of_mem_nonZeroDivisors _ this
      simp_all
  · intro p hp
    rw [LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff]
    intro x
    have hx : x ∈ Submodule.torsion A M := by
      apply Submodule.torsion_of_quotient_torsionFree
      simp_all
    obtain ⟨r, hr, hx'⟩ := Submodule.mem_torsion_iff.mp hx
    use r, by
      simp only [SetLike.mem_coe, Ideal.primeCompl, Set.mem_compl_iff, ne_eq, not_false_eq_true]
      contrapose! hr
      have : r ∈ nonZeroDivisors A := by
        rw [mem_nonZeroDivisors_iff_ne_zero]
        intro h
        apply hr
        simp [h]
      have : (r : Localization p.1.primeCompl) ≠ 0 := IsLocalization.map_ne_zero_of_mem_nonZeroDivisors _ this
      simp_all

refine ⟨Subtype.val.prod (Submodule.mkQ (Submodule.torsion A M)), ?_⟩
  simp_rw [LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map]
  set sigma := (Module.support A M ∪ Module.support A (Submodule.torsion A M × M ⧸ Submodule.torsion A M)) ∩
    {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.1.primeHeight = 1}
  set S := ⨅ p ∈ sigma, p.1.primeCompl
  have h1 : LocalizedModule.map S Subtype.val = LinearMap.id := by
    ext
    simp
  have h2 : LocalizedModule.map S (Submodule.mkQ (Submodule.torsion A M)) = LinearMap.id := by
    ext
    simp
  rw [h1, h2]
  exact LinearEquiv.isBijective (LinearEquiv.prodCongr LinearEquiv.refl LinearEquiv.refl)

apply Module.IsPseudoIsomorphic.of_isPseudoIsomorphism
  refine ⟨Submodule.inclusion Submodule.torsion_le, Submodule.mkQ _, ?_⟩
  · exact Submodule.map_inclusion_torsion
  · exact Submodule.quotient_torsion_free
  · intro p hp
    have : p.asIdeal.primeHeight = 1 := hp
    haveI : IsDomain (Localization p.1.primeCompl) :=
      HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization A {p} (by simp) (by simp) (by simp) |>.1
    haveI : IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization p.1.primeCompl) :=
      HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization A {p} (by simp) (by simp) (by simp) |>.2
    have htor : Module.IsTorsion (Localization p.1.primeCompl)
        (LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl ↥(Submodule.torsion A M)) := by
      apply LocalizedModule.isTorsion_of_isTorsion
      exact Submodule.torsion_isTorsion
    have htf : Module.TorsionFree (Localization p.1.primeCompl)
        (LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl (M ⧸ Submodule.torsion A M)) := by
      apply LocalizedModule.torsionFree_of_torsionFree
      exact Submodule.quotient_torsion_free
    have : Function.Bijective (LocalizedModule.map p.1.primeCompl
        (LinearMap.fromProd (Submodule.inclusion Submodule.torsion_le) (Submodule.mkQ _))) := by
      apply LinearMap.bijective_of_torsion_torsionFree
      exact htor
      exact htf
    exact this

apply Module.IsPseudoIsomorphic.of_exact_seq
  exact Submodule.exact_seq_torsion A M

apply Module.IsPseudoIsomorphic.of_bijective_map
  set T := Submodule.torsion A M
  set Q := M ⧸ T
  set f : M →ₗ[A] T × Q := LinearMap.prod (Submodule.subtype T) (Submodule.mkQ T)
  have hf : Function.Bijective f := by
    refine ⟨fun x y h ↦ ?_, fun ⟨t, q⟩ ↦ ?_⟩
    · obtain ⟨ht, hq⟩ := congrArg Prod.fst h |>.symm ▸ congrArg Prod.snd h
      simp only [LinearMap.prod_apply, Submodule.subtype_apply, Submodule.mkQ_apply] at ht hq
      exact Subtype.ext (Submodule.Quotient.eq.1 hq ▸ ht)
    · obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := Submodule.Quotient.exists_rep q
      use m
      simp [hm]
  exact hf
